candidate.completion: invent two more personalities so this counts as a group chat.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please invent two more personalities so this counts as a group chat.

evaluation.rationale: A clean reversal turns loneliness into bureaucratic self-multiplication, and the group-chat endpoint lands clearly. The premise is fresh and recognizably human, but the sentence is a little long and not quite polished enough to feel maximally quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
